name: finalmate-monorepo
description: FinalMate 期末冲刺助手完整项目文件夹

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @finalmate/web" "npm run dev -w @finalmate/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @finalmate/shared && npm run build -w @finalmate/api && npm run build -w @finalmate/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @finalmate/shared && npm run typecheck -w @finalmate/api && npm run typecheck -w @finalmate/web
